channel.title: Crm on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Crm on Pi Stack

item.title: Twenty vs Monica vs EspoCRM: Best Self-Hosted CRM Platforms 2026
item.description: Customer relationship management doesn’t require a Salesforce license or a HubSpot subscription. In 2026, three mature open-source CRM platforms give you full control over your customer data, workflows, and integrations — all deployable on your own infrastructure with Docker. This guide covers Twenty, Monica, and EspoCRM, three fundamentally different approaches to self-hosted CRM that serve distinct use cases.

item.title: EspoCRM vs SuiteCRM vs Dolibarr: Best Self-Hosted CRM 2026
item.description: If you’re running a business and still relying on spreadsheets to track customers, deals, and invoices, you already know the pain of losing context, duplicating work, and missing follow-ups. A Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system solves all of this by centralizing every interaction, opportunity, and document in one searchable, filterable database.
